title: Semantic Typecheck Gate
goal: Add a real semantic TypeScript typecheck gate to verify.sh, offline and deterministic, skip-if-absent so consumers stay clean, and fix the baseline type errors it surfaces.

success_criteria.check: Standalone tsc exits 0 in dev repo
verify.sh exits 0 with 5 checks, typecheck PASS as Check 4/5 (tsc present)
With tsc absent, verify.sh exits 0 and typecheck prints SKIP (not PASS, not FAIL)
Shipped template stays clean (no package.json for consumers)
No stale typecheck/4-check claims in shipped docs (incl. ship.md)
success_criteria.verify: rg -n 'is NOT a semantic typecheck|typescript is not a dep|Check [0-9]/4|4/4' .opencode/tool/verify.sh .opencode/command/verify.md .opencode/command/ship.md AGENTS.md .opencode/tech-stack.md

tasks.title: Install typecheck toolchain + discover baseline
tasks.end_state: Dev repo has typescript@7.0.2 + @types/node + the chosen Bun ambient types installed as exact-pinned devDeps, and a standalone tsc run reveals the complete baseline error list.
verification: .opencode/node_modules/.bin/tsc --version prints 7.0.2
.opencode/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p .opencode/tsconfig.json runs; capture the error list for Task 2
node -e "console.log(require('./.opencode/package.json').devDependencies)" lists typescript + @types/node + Bun types package, all exact-pinned

tasks.title: Fix baseline type errors
tasks.end_state: All type errors surfaced by Task 1 are fixed in-source (real narrowing + correct types from @types/bun); the local bun.d.ts shim is removed if @types/bun covers the spawn/kill API, kept+documented only if insufficient; no @ts-nocheck, no any suppression, no tsconfig loosening.
verification: .opencode/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p .opencode/tsconfig.json exits 0
rg -n '@ts-nocheck|as any' .opencode/plugin .opencode/tool returns no new occurrences
If bun.d.ts removed: rg -n 'Bun\.(spawn|which)' .opencode/plugin call sites still typecheck (covered by @types/bun)

tasks.title: Track and trim nested .gitignore
tasks.end_state: .opencode/.gitignore is trimmed (keep node_modules/bun.lock/.fallow) and tracked by git; .opencode/package.json + package-lock.json tracked; root .gitignore untouched; reproducibility holds across fresh clones.
verification: git ls-files .opencode/package.json .opencode/package-lock.json .opencode/.gitignore lists all three
git check-ignore .opencode/.fallow .opencode/bun.lock .opencode/node_modules shows all still ignored
git check-ignore .opencode/package.json .opencode/package-lock.json .opencode/.gitignore returns nothing (un-ignored)
rg -n '.fallow' .gitignore returns no matches (root untouched)

tasks.title: Wire semantic typecheck into verify.sh (Check 4/5, skip-if-absent) + regression test
tasks.end_state: verify.sh runs typecheck as Check 4/5 (after Bun compile, before git diff) invoking the nested .opencode/node_modules/.bin/tsc directly; PASS when green, FAIL when red, SKIP (INFO, not counted) when absent; N/4 labels renumbered to N/5; header drops the 'NOT a semantic typecheck' disclaimer; isolated regression test covers PASS/FAIL/two-SKIP branches.
verification: bash .opencode/tool/verify.sh exits 0; output shows Check 4/5 with PASS (tsc present)
bash .opencode/tool/verify-typecheck-test.sh exits 0 (isolated PASS/FAIL/SKIP regression passes)
mv .opencode/node_modules .opencode/node_modules.bak && bash .opencode/tool/verify.sh; echo exit; mv back → exit 0 and typecheck line shows SKIP
rg -n 'Check [0-9]/4|4/4' .opencode/tool/verify.sh returns no matches (renumbered)

tasks.title: Update stale docs + durable memory (incl. ship.md)
tasks.end_state: verify.md, ship.md, README.md, root AGENTS.md, tech-stack.md reflect the 5-check verifier with Check 4/5 typecheck and skip-if-absent; MEMORY.md supersedes the 'typescript not a dep' decisions; roadmap.md moves semantic-typecheck out of Deferred; state.md records the completed work + context note.
verification: rg -n 'is NOT a semantic typecheck|typescript is not a dep|Check [0-9]/4|4/4' .opencode/tool/verify.sh .opencode/command/verify.md .opencode/command/ship.md AGENTS.md .opencode/tech-stack.md returns no matches
rg -n 'semantic typecheck|4/5|skip-if-absent' .opencode/command/verify.md .opencode/command/ship.md returns matches (new docs present)

tasks.title: Generic export policy + artifact finalization
tasks.end_state: template/.opencode regenerated; consumers do NOT receive package.json/lockfile or working planning artifacts; sync-template.sh uses a generic artifact allowlist (ship only artifacts/MEMORY.md, artifacts/todo.md, artifacts/example/**); final verify.sh exits 0; spec/prd/plan marked Complete and .active removed.
verification: bash .opencode/tool/sync-template.sh succeeds
test ! -f template/.opencode/package.json && echo consumer clean
test ! -e template/.opencode/artifacts/semantic-typecheck && echo no working artifacts leaked
test -f template/.opencode/artifacts/MEMORY.md && test -f template/.opencode/artifacts/todo.md && echo allowlisted artifacts present
npm_config_offline=true bash template/.opencode/tool/verify.sh → exit 0 and typecheck line shows SKIP
test ! -e .opencode/artifacts/.active && echo artifact closed
bash .opencode/tool/verify.sh exits 0

open_questions.question: @types/bun vs bun-types package? tsconfig currently says bun-types (older) — which is current and does its types entry become ["node","bun"]?
open_questions.status: Resolved: @types/bun@1.3.14 (depends on bun-types@1.3.14); types entry becomes ["node","bun"]

open_questions.question: Exact baseline error count + whether bun.d.ts shim is removable
Delete .opencode/.gitignore entirely vs trim lines 2,3,5 only (keep node_modules/bun.lock/.fallow local)

stop_conditions: Task 1 reveals >10 baseline errors or an API refactor (not just narrowing) → stop, surface to user (may indicate wrong types-package choice)
tsc under TS 7.0 surfaces a strictness issue that seems wrong → document and decide rather than suppress
